arts.ttl: Crystal Palace closing in on the capture of 19-year-old attacking prodigy
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are closing in on the signing of Gabriel Aguayo. According to a report from Popular, the 19-year-old winger has attracted the attention of multiple clubs and the Eagles are now set to win the race for his signature. Crystal Palace are close to securing an agreement with his club Cerro Porteno. arts.ttl: Agent admits player has joined Brentford ‘with a bit of sadness’ – But Premier League ‘perfect for him’
arts.sum: Fiorentina will hold a percentage of a future sale on Michael Kayode should Brentford make his loan spell permanent in the summer. That’s according to his agent, Andrea Ritorni, who has speaking to Radio Bruno, via Fiorentina Uno, about his client’s move to Brentford this week. arts.ttl: Report: Point apiece as Spurs hold Palace at Copers Cope
arts.sum: Crystal Palace Under-18s extended their unbeaten run to four games as they drew 1-1 with Tottenham Hotspur. Sebastian Williams opened the scoring in spectacular fashion with a brilliant long-range strike, before Ellis Lehane equalised from the spot in the second-half.

arts.ttl: Juventus attempts to tempt Tottenham, Crystal Palace and Fulham into €20m deal don’t appear to work
arts.sum: Juventus’ attempts to tempt Tottenham, Crystal Palace and Fulham into a €20m move for Nicolò Fagioli appear to have failed. That’s according to Corriere dello Sport, who report that Juventus’ attempts to drum up interest in the midfielder in England have so far failed. arts.ttl: Gallery: Palace prepare to host Brentford in SE25
arts.sum: The London derbies are coming thick and fast for Crystal Palace in early 2025, with their third already this calendar year coming on Sunday against Brentford at Selhurst Park.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace table €12m offer for midfielder – €15m will get deal done for interest clubs
arts.sum: According to a claim in the Turkish media, Crystal Palace have stepped up in their pursuit for Trabzonspor midfielder Batista Mendy, but face competition from Rennes. The 24-year-old was a reported target for the Eagles during the last summer window and he’s continued to be linked with a move to Selhurst Park.
